titleStmt.title: SII 29.141: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 141. (A.R. No. B. 183 of 1962-63.) CHENNIPĀḌU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept in front of Kēśavaśvāmi temple.

The record belonging to the reign period of emperor Krishnadēvamahārāya registers a gift of the village Gōkulapāḍu alias Bhandarada Pēdāpura to god Chennakēśva of Chennipāḍu by Peddināyaka son of Bhandarada Siddhināyaka for the merit of the king.
The gift village was situated in Alampura-Sīme which was given to the donor by the king as Amaranāyakatana.
The record is dated Śaka 1449, Sarvajitu, Chaitra, Śu. 1. It corresponds to 1527 A.D., March 3, [Sunday].

This is the date of issuing the record. But the grant was actually made some time back, the date of which is available in the record. The grant was made on Pushya, ba. 10 of the cyclic year Vyaya. It corresponds to 1526 A.D., December 29, [Saturday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Published in Telangāṇā Śāsanamulu, Vol. II, p. 148, No. 5.
div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraśuṁ(ścuṁ)bi caṁdra cāmara cāravē .
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1449 neya sarvajitu saṁ
vatsarada caitra śu 1 lu ceṁnipāḍa śrī ceṁnnakēśvara dēvarige . śrī manmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrī vīra kṛṣṇadēva mahā
rāyaru ratna siṁhāsanā rūḍharāgi pṛthivi rājyaṁ gēyitaṁ yiralāgi . bhaṁḍā
rada sidhināyakara makaḷu peddināyakaru sāṣṭāṁga namaskāra māḍi samarppisikoṭṭa
grāmadharmma śāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare śrī kṟuṣṇarāya maharāyaru namage Ama
ra nāyakatanakke pālisida Alaṁpūra sīmeya voḷagaṇa gōkulapāḍa grā
makke pratināmavāda bhaṁḍārada pedāpurada grāmavannu ceṁnnakēśvara dēvara
Amṛta paḍi Aṁgaraṁga vaibhavakke veyasaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 10 saṁkrāṁ
tiya puṁṇya kāladalu naṁmma svāmi kruṣṇarāya mahārāyarige pu
ṁṇyavāgi sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakavāgi trivābā dhāreya
neradu koṭevu . Ā gōkulapāḍa prati nāmavāda bhaṁḍārada pēdāpu
rada grāmakke saluva Aṣṭa bōga tēja sāṁmya sakaḷa suvarnādāya sa(ṁ)
kaḷa dhāṁnya Ādāya A grāmakke saluva catusīmevoḷagāda . nidhinikṣē
pa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidhasādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭa bhōga tē(ṁ)
ja sāṁmya sarvōtsatya samasta baḷi sahitavāgi . Ā caṁdrārkastāyi
Āgi ceṁnipāḍa ceṁnnakēśvara dēvarige gōkulapāḍa grāmakke pratinā
mavāda bhaṁḍārada pedāpurada grāmavanu dhāreyaneṟadu ko
ṭevu . stānamāṁnya pūrvamariyāde . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpa harēṇa . svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ .
bhavēt . svadatāṁ(ttāṁ) paradattāṁ vā . yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭhirva(ṁ)
ruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapā(ṁ)
lana yōrmadhye . dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt svargama
vāpnōti pālanādacyu(ṁ)taṁ padaṁ . śrī bhayirava .
Digital edition of SII 29.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
